records.description: AI developer tool that makes AI models easier to access via API keys.
records.howToObtain: Use CMU AI Gateway service page.
records.costToUser: No cost, but an Oracle String is required to pass on model endpoint costs.

evidence.sourceTitle: Protected AI Tools You Can Use - Computing Services
evidence.evidenceSnippet: AI Gateway | AI Developer tool makes AI models easier to access. | Accessing management to models via API keys. | Faculty and Staff | No cost; however an Oracle String is required to pass on any costs incurred from using a model endpoint.

records.description: OpenAI chatbot for research, writing, problem-solving, code, text, and image tasks.
records.howToObtain: Faculty and staff can purchase through the university software catalog; students require faculty or staff sponsorship.
records.costToUser: Tiered subscription model based on credit usage.

evidence.sourceTitle: Protected AI Tools You Can Use - Computing Services
evidence.evidenceSnippet: ChatGPT Edu | Synthesizes info, summarizes, and generates content. | Research, writing, and problem-solving. | Faculty and Staff; Students sponsored by a faculty or staff member | Tiered subscription model based on credit usage

records.description: UvA-developed AI chat service for safe experimentation within the UvA.
records.howToObtain: Go to UvA AI Chat at aichat.uva.nl/chat.

evidence.sourceTitle: AI tools and your studies
evidence.evidenceSnippet: To help you use AI responsibly and allow you to experiment with the possibilities of GenAI, the UvA has developed its own tool called UvA AI Chat.

evidence.sourceTitle: UvA AI Chat
evidence.evidenceSnippet: With UvA AI Chat, you can safely experiment with AI within the UvA. This allows you to make use of the possibilities offered by AI without sharing your data with third parties.

records.description: Commercial ChatGPT is not allowed in the context of UvA studies because of privacy regulations.
records.howToObtain: Use UvA AI Chat instead where allowed by UvA guidance.

evidence.sourceTitle: AI tools and your studies
evidence.evidenceSnippet: The use of commercial AI tools such as ChatGPT is not allowed in the context of your studies because these tools do not comply with the UvA’s privacy regulations.

records.description: PolyU generative AI application for teaching and learning, research, and work-related activities.

evidence.evidenceSnippet: The PolyU generative AI application is solely for PolyU staff and students to use for teaching and learning, research, and work-related activities only.

records.description: Agentic AI browser not permitted within KU Leuven.
